description: A customer's order has just shipped, and the logistics coordinator needs to send them an Advanced Shipping Notice (ASN).

nodes.task_description: Identify the sales order that has been shipped.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the sales order that was just processed for shipment.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the carrier name and tracking number for the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the tracking information from the shipment record.

nodes.task_description: Send the ASN to the customer, including the order details, carrier, and tracking number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the ASN email to the customer's registered contact.
